title: The Yellow Rolls-Royce
actors: Ingrid Bergman, Rex Harrison, Shirley MacLaine
plot: Anthology movie about three owners of a yellow Rolls-Royce: a British diplomat buys the car for his French wife; a mobster's girlfriend has an affair in Italy; an American woman drives a Yugoslavian partisan.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 1 win & 3 nominations total
